steps.title: Keep the pair intact
steps.content: The sentence uses the paired structure “not only” and “but also.” The first half must read smoothly with “but also by vapor streams,” so punctuation should not interrupt “caused not only by cyclones.”

steps.title: Remove interrupting punctuation
steps.content: Choice A leaves an unmatched dash. Choice B wrongly sets the first half of the pair off with dashes. Choice C wrongly sets the same necessary phrase off with commas. The no-punctuation version preserves the correlative structure. The answer is D.
